usage: set_macro_place_constraint [-help] [<array elements>] [-array <string> [-common_hier <string>] [-valid_group_orients {R0 MX MY} ] [-place_order {horizontal vertical}] ] [{-insts <string> | -all_macros } [-orientation <string>] [-common_hier <string>]] [-cells <string> {-cell_obs <string> | -track_adjustment <string>}] [-cpg <string>] [[-max_io_pin_group_keep_out <string> ] [-forbidden_space_to_core <string>] [-forbidden_space_to_macro <string>] [-min_space_to_core <string>] [-min_space_to_macro <string>] [-parallel_run_length <string>] [-horizontal_stacking <string>] [-vertical_stacking <string>] [-honor_strict_spacing_constraint {true false}] [-avoid_abut_macro_edge_with_pins {true false}] [-same_length_site <integer> ] [-pg_resource_model <string>] [-macro_corner_keepout <string>][-halo_sharing {true false}] [-parallel_run_length_for_stacking <string>] [-power_domain_as_core {true false}] ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <array elements> # macro element list

options.name: -all_macros
options.description: indicate that all macros should honor the constraints

options.name: -array
options.description: specify the macro array name

options.name: -avoid_abut_macro_edge_with_pins
options.description: {true false} not abut macro edges with pins even macro distance is within forbidden spacing setting, default value is true

options.name: -cell_obs
options.description: specify the layer width pitch to add cell obstruction on each macro to model power stripes

options.name: -cells
options.description: specify the constraints for all instances of a cell.

options.name: -common_hier
options.description: specify the common logic hierarchy name

options.name: -cpg
options.description: specify the cpg guide of one instance

options.name: -forbidden_space_to_core
options.description: specify one or two forbidden space to core. If the space between macro and core is smaller than this value, abut the macros to core. Two values are to define separate forbidden space on horizontal and vertical which should be included in {}.

options.name: -forbidden_space_to_macro
options.description: specify one or two forbidden space to macro. If the space between macros is smaller than this value, abut the macros. Two values are to define separate forbidden space on horizontal and vertical which should be included in {}.

options.name: -halo_sharing
options.description: share halo when two macros are abutted

options.name: -honor_strict_spacing_constraint
options.description: {true false} honor forbidden spacing and minimum spacing strictly, default value is false

options.name: -horizontal_stacking
options.description: specify the max horizontal stack depth and the minimum horizontal spacing

options.name: -insts
options.description: specify the macros which will be set the constraints on.

options.name: -macro_corner_keepout
options.description: specify macro corner spacing constraint

options.name: -max_io_pin_group_keep_out
options.description: specify the max height and (optionally) side extension to automatically add macro-only blockages to IO pins.

options.name: -min_space_to_core
options.description: specify one or two minimum space to core. If the space between macro and core is smaller than this value and larger than forbidden space, push them away from core to minimum space. Two values are to define separate minimum space on horizontal and vertical which should be included in {}.

options.name: -min_space_to_macro
options.description: specify one or two the minimum space to macro. If the space between macros is less than this value and larger than forbidden space, push them away to minimum space. Two values are to define separate minimum space on horizontal and vertical which should be included in {}.

options.name: -orientation
options.description: specify the allowable orientation for macros. Overwrite the previous definition.

options.name: -parallel_run_length
options.description: specify the parallel run length to enable space checking. Two values are to define separate parallel run length on horizontal and vertical which should be included in {}.

options.name: -parallel_run_length_for_stacking
options.description: <string> specify one or two parallel run length for stacking. Two values are to define separate parallel run length on horizontal and vertical which should be included in {}.

options.name: -pg_resource_model
options.description: specify the pg resource model

options.name: -place_order
options.description: specify the place order, default value is horizontal

options.name: -power_domain_as_core
options.description: Specifies that tool needs to treat power domain boundary as core boundary, default value is false

options.name: -same_length_site
options.description: minimum number of site between vertical edge of two macros

options.name: -track_adjustment
options.description: specify the layer density to add track adjustment on each macro

options.name: -valid_group_orients
options.description: valid orientations for the whole group

options.name: -vertical_stacking
options.description: specify the max vertical stack depth and the minimum vertical spacing
